title: Louisiana Child Representation System; establishment
doc_html:
Art. 558.  Louisiana Child Representation System; establishment

The statewide Louisiana Child Representation System is hereby established under the oversight of the Louisiana Supreme Court.

Acts 2006, No. 271, §1; Acts 2014, No. 354, §1.

Art. 558.  Louisiana Child Representation System; establishment
